title: SiTime Analyst Ratings and Consensus - Strong Buy Consensus
text: SITM analyst consensus shows strong buy ratings with 8 Buy, 1 Hold, and 0 Sell ratings from 14 analysts. Median price target is $450.00 with a range from $400.00 to $500.00. However, following recent Q1 2026 earnings beat and AI momentum, several analysts raised their price targets significantly. Roth Capital increased target to $900 from $450, Goldman Sachs raised to $800 from $435, Needham increased to $850 from $450, and Barclays upgraded to Overweight. The consensus highlights SiTime's strong positioning in AI data center markets and the strategic value of the Renesas timing business acquisition. Near-term catalysts include the Renesas deal closure and Elite 2 Super-TCXO volume ramp.
